name: bun-deps-lens

scripts.build: bun build ./src/extension.ts --outdir dist --target node --format cjs --external vscode --minify --sourcemap=linked
scripts.build:dev: bun build ./src/extension.ts --outdir dist --target node --format cjs --external vscode --sourcemap=linked
scripts.watch: bun build ./src/extension.ts --outdir dist --target node --format cjs --external vscode --sourcemap=linked --watch

description: Inline colour-coded dependency status for package.json, powered by Bun's outdated & audit CLIs.

bunDepsLens.enable.description: Master toggle for Bun Deps Lens annotations.

bunDepsLens.refreshIntervalMinutes.description: Background re-check cadence in minutes while a package.json is open. Set to 0 to disable background refresh.

bunDepsLens.severityThreshold.description: Minimum audit severity that colours a dependency red.

bunDepsLens.showInlineVersions.description: Show the faint 'current → latest' text after outdated dependencies.

bunDepsLens.respectMinimumReleaseAge.description: Honour bunfig.toml [install].minimumReleaseAge when deciding what counts as installable (v1.1).
